module.title: SAP TM Freight Settlement & Charge Management

learningObjectives.title: Understand invoice verification
learningObjectives.description: Explain validation of carrier invoices against freight settlement data.

learningObjectives.title: Understand financial integration
learningObjectives.description: Describe integration between SAP TM and SAP S/4HANA Finance for postings and payment.

learningObjectives.title: Understand verification controls
learningObjectives.description: Clarify validation rules and automated matching for payment accuracy.

sections.content: Invoice Verification is the process of validating the carrier's invoice against the Freight Settlement Document (FSD). SAP TM integrates with SAP S/4HANA Finance to ensure that only verified transportation charges are posted and paid. This integration eliminates manual reconciliation and improves financial accuracy.

sections.title: Key Concept
sections.content: SAP TM calculates transportation charges, while SAP S/4HANA Finance verifies and processes financial payment.

items: Compare invoices with Freight Settlement Documents

sections.content: A carrier submits an invoice for ₹145,000 after transporting goods. SAP TM compares the invoice with the Freight Settlement Document. Since all transportation charges match, SAP S/4HANA Finance automatically posts the accounting entries and schedules the payment through Accounts Payable.

sections.title: Best Practice
sections.content: Configure automatic invoice matching with appropriate tolerance limits so only genuine pricing differences require manual review.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: A global retail company automated invoice verification for over 20,000 carrier invoices each month. More than 92% of invoices were matched automatically, reducing finance processing effort significantly.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: Remember the sequence: Freight Settlement Document -> Carrier Invoice -> Invoice Verification -> Financial Posting -> Carrier Payment.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: Invoice Verification does not calculate transportation charges. It validates the carrier invoice against the already calculated Freight Settlement Document.

items: Freight Settlement Documents are the basis for verification.
SAP TM integrates with SAP S/4HANA Finance for financial postings.
Verified invoices proceed to Accounts Payable for carrier payment.
